pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1194 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLPs, legal score-first chunked TTT, and Parameter Banking/Parallel Muon keep the architecture compliant while adapting validation chunks efficiently.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts on validation chunks via score-first passes, so the reported training updates occur solely on validation data.
techniques: Parameter Banking plus Parallel Muon optimizer pipeline
